message:
fix: Update std.mem.sort call for Zig 0.15.2 API

Zig 0.15.2 changed std.mem.sort to require 4 arguments:
- Type
- Slice
- Context (separate argument)
- lessThan function (separate argument)

Previously the context and function were passed as an inline anonymous
struct. Now they must be separate.

Fixes compilation error:
  error: expected 4 argument(s), found 3
